// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: HashTable
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class StaticData
{

    private static char GetCharAt(string str, int index) => str[index];
    private static char GetCharFromEnd(string str, int fromEnd) => str[str.Length - 1 - fromEnd];
    private static int GetLength(string str) => str.Length;

    [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Auto)]
    private struct E
    {
        internal string Key;
        internal sbyte Next;
        internal ulong HashCode;
        internal E(string key, sbyte next, ulong hashCode)
        {
            Key = key;
            Next = next;
            HashCode = hashCode;
        }
    };

    private static readonly sbyte[] _buckets = new sbyte[] {
        1, 3, 2
    };

    private static readonly E[] _entries = {
        new E("item1", -1, 17825845005562073391ul), new E("item2", -1, 17825845003995989450ul), new E("item3", -1, 17825845002429905509ul)
    };

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    private static ulong Hash(string value)
    {
        ulong hash = 352654597;

        ref char ptr = ref MemoryMarshal.GetReference(value.AsSpan());
        int len = value.Length;

        while (len-- > 0)
        {
            hash = (((hash << 5) | (hash >> 27)) + hash) ^ ptr;
            ptr = ref Unsafe.Add(ref ptr, 1);
        }

        return 352654597 + (hash * 1566083941);
    }

    
    public static bool Contains(string key)
    {
        int getLength;
        char getCharFromEnd;
        char getCharAt;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength > 5))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getCharFromEnd = GetCharFromEnd(key, 0);
        if ((getCharFromEnd > '3'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getCharAt = GetCharAt(key, 0);
        if ((getCharAt > 'i'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((getCharAt < 'i'))
        {
         return false;
        }



        ulong hash = Hash(key);
        int index = (int)(hash % 3);
        sbyte i = (sbyte)(_buckets[index] - 1);

        while (i >= 0)
        {
            ref E entry = ref _entries[i];

            if (entry.HashCode == hash && StringComparer.Ordinal.Equals(entry.Key, key))
                return true;

            i = entry.Next;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 3;
    public const int MinKeyLength = 5;
    public const int MaxKeyLength = 5;
    public const bool HasNumber = true;
    public const bool HasUppercase = false;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
